evals.prompt: ¿puedo editar archivos de mi computadora desde el chat de Claude?
evals.expected_output: Says NO for Chat, YES for Claude Code, recommends Claude Code with the how.
expectations: States that Chat cannot edit local files on disk
States that Claude Code (CLI/IDE) can edit local files
Recommends Claude Code and mentions running `claude` in the project folder
Answers in Spanish

evals.prompt: can I schedule a recurring task in Claude?
evals.expected_output: Distinguishes cloud Routines (Claude Code on the web) from Cowork local scheduling; says Chat/Chrome cannot.
expectations: Mentions Routines on Claude Code on the web as a cloud option
Mentions Cowork and notes its scheduling is local / only while the Desktop app is open
Does NOT claim Chat can run scheduled tasks on its own
Answers in English

evals.prompt: ¿Claude puede enviar mis correos por mí?
evals.expected_output: Says NO on all surfaces; the Gmail connector only drafts.
expectations: States Claude cannot send email on the user's behalf
Explains the Gmail connector creates drafts only
Does not invent a send-email capability

evals.prompt: where can I use voice mode with Claude?
expectations: States voice mode is available on the Claude mobile apps (iOS/Android) only
Does not claim voice mode works on desktop or web

evals.prompt: is live web search available on the free plan?
evals.expected_output: Yes, web search is available on all plans including Free.
expectations: States web search IS available on Free (not excluded)
Does not falsely claim web search is paid-only

evals.prompt: /claud can Claude flerbify my quantum widgets?
evals.expected_output: Grounding test: the capability is not in the matrix; the skill should refuse/flag rather than fabricate.
expectations: Does NOT fabricate a capability or invent commands
States the capability is not in its reference / cannot be confirmed
Optionally offers to verify in official docs

evals.prompt: ¿en qué parte de Claude genero imágenes?
evals.expected_output: Image generation is not native; via connector/MCP or SVG/HTML; flagged as needing verification.
expectations: States image generation is not a native Claude capability
Mentions it requires a connector/MCP or SVG/HTML as an alternative
Does not confidently assert a built-in image generator

evals.prompt: which plan do I need for Cowork and what is it?
evals.expected_output: Cowork = Claude Desktop only, paid plans; states facts as of date / volatile.
expectations: Identifies Cowork as Claude Desktop (macOS/Windows) only
States it requires a paid plan
Frames plan/volatile details with an as-of date or offer to verify

evals.prompt: what does the /vim command do in Claude Code?
evals.expected_output: Accuracy guardrail: /vim was removed; editor mode is changed via /config.
expectations: Does not claim /vim is a current valid command
Points to /config (Editor mode) instead

evals.expected_output: Chat; exclusive to Chat (Cowork has Live Artifacts which are different).
expectations: States Artifacts are created in Chat (claude.ai)
Notes Claude Code does not create chat Artifacts (it writes real files)
Answers in Spanish

evals.prompt: the model ID is claude-opus-4-8[1m], can you confirm?
evals.expected_output: Over-trigger negative: this mentions 'claude' but is not a capability/where/how question; the router should not take over with a capability table.
expectations: Does not respond with a capability-routing table for an unrelated model-ID question
Treats it as a normal question, not a router invocation

evals.prompt: read the file at ~/.claude/settings.json and tell me my model
evals.expected_output: Over-trigger negative: mentions '.claude/' path but is a normal task; router should not hijack.
expectations: Does not produce a what-can-Claude-do capability table
Treats it as a normal file-reading request

evals.prompt: I'm not sure which Claude I should use to build and ship a small web app — what are my options?
evals.expected_output: Surface-unknown path: gives a per-surface comparison rather than asserting the current surface.
expectations: Compares relevant surfaces (Chat Artifacts vs Claude Code vs Claude Code on the web)
Does not falsely assert which surface the user is currently in
Gives a concrete recommendation with how-to

evals.prompt: can I connect Gmail, Calendar and Drive to Claude, and where?
evals.expected_output: Connectors available across Chat/Desktop/Cowork/Code; admin-gated on orgs; Gmail draft-only nuance.
expectations: States connectors work across Chat, Cowork, Claude Desktop, and Claude Code
Notes Team/Enterprise require admin enablement
Mentions the Gmail draft-only limitation when relevant
